name: Deanna's Secret Cheeseball
recipeIngredient: 5 ounce jar Old English cheese spread
5 ounce jar Roka Blue cheese spread
5 ounce jar Garlic cheese spread (can substitute with soft, spreadable garlic and herbs cheese)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the 5 ounce jars of Old English cheese spread, Roka Blue cheese spread, and Garlic cheese spread.
2. Add 8 ounce packages of cream cheese to the mixture.
3. Stir in 1/4 cup of dehydrated minced onion and 1 tablespoon of Worcestershire sauce.
4. If desired, roll the mixture into a ball and then coat with chopped nuts.
5. Chill thoroughly before serving as a spread with crackers. It pairs well with wheat-type crackers.
